title: valeriana stolonifera subsp. pralensis
intro: Valeriana stolonifera subsp. pralensis, also known as Korean valerian, is a subspecies of the valerian plant that is native to East Asia, particularly in China and Korea. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its sedative, anti-anxiety, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Korean valerian include relief from insomnia, stress, and anxiety disorders, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve sleep quality. Korean valerian can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, extracts, and capsules, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
